_note: TensorRT 10.3 FP16/INT8 engines, densenet121-res224 on Jetson Orin Nano Super (MAXN_SUPER, full clock). Throughput = mean of 3 trtexec runs (each hundreds of averaged iterations), spaced with cooldowns to hold clocks; *_se = standard error over the 3 runs. AUROC on 2000 labeled ChestMNIST images; auroc_se = 1000-sample bootstrap SE.

int8._note: INT8 post-training quantization (entropy calibration on 512 ChestMNIST images), densenet-nih. Throughput = mean of 3 spaced trtexec runs; AUROC on 2000 labeled test images with 1000-sample bootstrap SE.
